steps.title: Estimate the slope
steps.content:
Use two points the fit line appears to pass near: $t=12$, $d=480$, and $t=24$, $d=880$. These readings are approximate points from the drawn fit line. The slope calculation is
$$\frac{880-480}{24-12}=\frac{400}{12}$$
This is about $33$.

steps.title: Match the model
steps.content: A reasonable line of best fit is $d=33t+84$. The answer is D.
